title: Costume Attendants
description: Select, fit, and take care of costumes for cast members, and aid entertainers. May assist with multiple costume changes during performances.

tasks.text: Create worksheets for dressing lists, show notes, or costume checks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide dressing assistance to cast members or assign cast dressers to assist specific cast members with costume changes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange costumes in order of use to facilitate quick-change procedures for performances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design or construct costumes or send them to tailors for construction, major repairs, or alterations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine costume fit on cast members and sketch or write notes for alterations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Distribute costumes or related equipment and keep records of item status.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Check the appearance of costumes on stage or under lights to determine whether desired effects are being achieved.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and press costumes before and after performances and perform any minor repairs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with production designers, costume designers, or other production staff to discuss and execute costume design details.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor, maintain, or secure inventories of costumes, wigs, or makeup, providing keys or access to assigned directors, costume designers, or wardrobe mistresses/masters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Purchase, rent, or requisition costumes or other wardrobe necessities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study books, pictures, or examples of period clothing to determine styles worn during specific periods in history.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Return borrowed or rented items when productions are complete and return other items to storage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review scripts or other production information to determine a story's locale or period, as well as the number of characters and required costumes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inventory stock to determine types or conditions of available costuming.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct the work of wardrobe crews during dress rehearsals or performances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in the hiring, training, scheduling, or supervision of alteration workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide managers with budget recommendations and take responsibility for budgetary line items related to costumes, storage, or makeup needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assign lockers to employees and maintain locker rooms, dressing rooms, wig rooms, or costume storage or laundry areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend vendors and monitor their work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Care for non-clothing items, such as flags, table skirts, or draperies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
